designStatus: CONFIRMED — schema already exists; documenting pipeline bridge
recommendation: Option A — flat collection, latest-only, with additive history subcollection in future sprint

firestoreSchema.documentIdScheme: figureId for figure-level; seriesId for series-level fallback

fieldMapping.transform: look up from catalog bundle using figureId
use medianPrice; skip document if null or <= 0
always 'unknown' for MVP; computed once history exists
averagePrice is internal; do not write to Firestore
internal provenance; do not write to Firestore

pipelineBridge.writeCondition: Only write document if medianPrice is not null AND medianPrice > 0

readPatterns.description: Show latest valuation for one figure
Show valuation for many owned figures
readPatterns.query: N individual doc reads (one per figureId)
readPatterns.notes: Firestore charges per document read; 1,137 reads for full collection unlikely at once. Provider caches results.

readPatterns.description: Fetch all figure-level snapshots in a series

historicalStrategy.mvp: latest-only — overwrite on each pipeline run
historicalStrategy.future: price_history/{YYYY-MM-DD} subcollection; additive, no migration required
historicalStrategy.trendComputation: requires at least 2 snapshot dates; deferred to after first live production run

missingComponents.name: Production Firestore writer
missingComponents.description: push_market_snapshots.mjs — reads pipeline SnapshotDocument output, maps fields, batch-writes to market_snapshots. Pattern: mirrors push_market_snapshots_dev.mjs.

missingComponents.name: seriesId in SnapshotDocument
missingComponents.description: SnapshotDocument must include seriesId (available from catalog at match time). Required by Firestore schema.

missingComponents.name: Confidence level in SnapshotDocument
missingComponents.description: Compute 'high' / 'low' from sampleSize >= 5 threshold. Can be computed in buildSnapshotDocument or in the writer.

missingComponents.name: Series-level fallback snapshot generation
missingComponents.description: No mechanism currently computes series-level fallback estimates. Needed for figures with no individual sales data.
